title: Orderlies
description: Transport patients to areas such as operating rooms or x-ray rooms using wheelchairs, stretchers, or moveable beds. May maintain stocks of supplies or clean and transport equipment. Psychiatric orderlies are included in Psychiatric Aides.

tasks.text: Lift or assist others to lift patients to move them on or off beds, examination tables, surgical tables, or stretchers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Transport patients to treatment units, testing units, operating rooms, or other areas, using wheelchairs, stretchers, or moveable beds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Disinfect or sterilize equipment or supplies, using germicides or sterilizing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean equipment, such as wheelchairs, hospital beds, or portable medical equipment, documenting needed repairs or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to emergency situations, such as emergency medical calls, security calls, or fire alarms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Change soiled linens, such as bed linens, drapes, or cubicle curtains.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Carry messages or documents between departments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport portable medical equipment or medical supplies between rooms or departments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and sanitize patient rooms, bathrooms, examination rooms, or other patient areas.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and transport infectious or hazardous waste in closed containers for sterilization or disposal, in accordance with applicable law, standards, or policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport specimens, laboratory items, or pharmacy items, ensuring proper documentation and delivery to authorized personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect soiled linen or trash.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide physical support to patients to assist them to perform daily living activities, such as getting out of bed, bathing, dressing, using the toilet, standing, walking, or exercising.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Separate collected materials for disposal, recycling, or reuse, in accordance with environmental policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Restrain patients to prevent violence or injury or to assist physicians or nurses to administer treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Turn or reposition bedridden patients, alone or with assistance, to prevent bedsores.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position or hold patients in position for surgical preparation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Stock utility rooms, nonmedical storage rooms, or cleaning carts with supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer patient call signals, signal lights, bells, or intercom systems to determine patients' needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Stock or issue medical supplies, such as dressing packs or treatment trays.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Transport bodies to the morgue.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve or collect food trays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
